diary_entries.entry: Population: 15. Solar flare disrupts electronics. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Selene.
Year 23 on Mars. Solar flare disrupts electronics. Morale is hopeful. We have 1284 food units left.
Population: 15. Solar flare disrupts electronics. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Titan.
